action.reasoning: Observation: rmse_z500 improved to 600.5 (val 604.3) with 15 epochs on 128ch/8block ResNet (~2.4M params), loss drops fast to ~0.05. Analysis: under-capacity for dynamics, no longitude periodicity (global field), can scale safely. Decision: add PeriodicConv2d (circular pad on lon), scale to 160ch/10blocks (~5M params), train 30 epochs (lr=3e-4, wd=1e-5, Cosine T=30), batch predict.py to avoid OOM; submit eval on new best.pt.
